name: Mom's Scalloped Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan over medium heat, melt the butter or margarine.
2. Add the flour; cook and stir for about one minute until bubbly.
3. Gradually add the milk and stir constantly until thickened.
4. Grease a 2-quart casserole dish.
5. Layer half of the potatoes and half of the onion in the casserole, seasoning with salt and pepper.
6. Repeat with the remaining potatoes and onions.
7. Pour the white sauce over all.
8. Cover and bake at 350°F for 30 minutes.
9. Remove the cover and bake for another 30 minutes, or until the potatoes are tender.
